caption: A news report features a man in a grey jacket and a patterned shawl speaking into microphones, including one with an "ANI" logo. He is surrounded by other individuals in a blurred outdoor setting. On-screen graphics include several portraits of political figures such as "नीतीश कुमार" and "संतोष सुमन," along with the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. The top frames display the headline "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and a news ticker that reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठबंधन परिवार बचाने के लिए". As the clip progresses, the headline changes to "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है," and the ticker text updates to "जे. पी. नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठ" and later "नड्डा:". At the bottom of every frame, an advertisement for "MAHAKOSH" mustard oil is visible, featuring the text "Mustard Oil Ka Captain" and "कच्ची घानी सरसोंन तेल."
